zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Pope於1608年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親John Blake Pope II28歲，母親Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth28歲。他於1637年1月28日與Anne Fallowell在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1683年8月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Pope于1608年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲John Blake Pope II28岁，母亲Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth28岁。他于1637年1月28日与Anne Fallowell在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1683年8月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Pope was born in 1608, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Blake Pope II, was 28 and his mother, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, was 28. He married Anne Fallowell on 28 January 1637, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 August 1683, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Pope est né en 1608, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Blake Pope II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Anne Fallowell le 28 janvier 1637, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 août 1683, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans.

Januar 1637 in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Anne Fallowell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. August 1683 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Pope è nato il nel 1608 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Blake Pope II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Anne Fallowell il 28 gennaio 1637, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 4 agosto 1683, nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Popeが1608年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父John Blake Pope IIは28歳，母Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnothは28歳であった。1637年1月28日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスプリモウスでAnne Fallowellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1683年8月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Pope(이)가 1608년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Blake Pope II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1637년 1월 28일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 플림우스에서 Anne Fallowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 8월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Pope nasceu em 1608, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Blake Pope II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Fallowell em 28 de janeiro de 1637, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1683, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Pope родился в 1608 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Blake Pope II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Marcy “Mary” Halsnoth, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Fallowell 28 января 1637 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 августа 1683 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Anne Fallowell el 28 de enero de 1637, en Plymouth, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1683, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años.
